case_title: ARACELI QUEZADA VS. JULI YE WONG

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-05-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH DEC-04-2020. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON NOV-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
